title: The Sterling Contract
description: Photographer Bianca Whitmore is forced into a one-year contract marriage with Alexander Sterling while investigating her mother's suspicious death. Alex is secretly a federal agent using the marriage to probe her family's laundering network. Two liars fall in love as they turn the contract into a weapon against the real enemy.

title: The Sterling Contract

Alex is secretly a federal agent using the marriage to probe her family's laundering network. Two liars fall in love as they turn the contract into a weapon against the real enemy.

title: MY BILLIONAIRE STEPBROTHER
description: To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. Amid family plots and deadly threats, the possessive man shields him. Gradually the straight‑laced youth gives in. Can their contractual bond grow into sincere lifelong love?

title: The Sterling Contract

title: THE BIG FREEZE
description: Climate scientist Jace Hardwell is murdered by his fiancée and wakes up thirty-seven days before a superfreeze will destroy the Northern Hemisphere. He builds a private bunker, exposes government lies, punishes his betrayers, and leads survivors toward a new civilization.

title: MY BILLIONAIRE STEPBROTHER
description: To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. Amid family plots and deadly threats, the possessive man shields him. Gradually the straight‑laced youth gives in. Can their contractual bond grow into sincere lifelong love?

title: survive and expose
description: A disabled girl discovers her uncle is using her as a test subject for an illegal experiment. Her mother agrees. But the girl has been collecting evidence all along. One call changes everything. The uncle falls. The mother awakens. And the daughter welcomes a bright future.

title: The Wrath of Snake Spirit
description: Ignoring warnings, a greedy mine manager hunts snakes for gold and triggers vengeful snake spirits. After deaths and explosions, he abandons workers and gets killed by a giant python. Only a few men escape through fire. Will hidden serpents strike again deep in sealed‑off mountains?

title: Crown of Silver wrath
description: She receives a recall order from her brother, the chairman of the werewolf council, and goes to his engagement banquet. But she is humiliated by two people there. At the critical moment, her brother arrives. The bullies have their wolf souls taken away. She lets go of her hatred and vows to become a fair and just leader of their kind.

title: Cracked Statue Becomes a God
description: A broken village god, forgotten and cracked, gets one last prayer from a dying believer, and awakens a system of faith and power. He defeats demons, gathers worshipers, and grows from a forgotten statue to a true divine protector. Sometimes gods aren't born. They're rebuilt.

title: Heart Beats On Ice
description: Freshman Avery becomes Laurent’s hockey manager for a full scholarship and lands in a chaotic, hormone-charged team. She clashes with moody Declan, gentle Finn, playful Wyatt and obsessive Brody. As three teammates ask her to Christmas dinner, who will she choose?

title: (Dubbed) My Gambler Husband Is A God
description: Hunted by enemies, a powerful immortal possesses a mortal gambler. Using awakened magic, he cures his mute wife, builds a massive fortune, and crushes the corrupt elites who bullied them. But just as they find happiness, an army of gods descends from the heavens to claim his life! Can he protect her?

title: The Sterling Contract
description: Photographer Bianca Whitmore is forced into a one-year contract marriage with Alexander Sterling while investigating her mother's suspicious death. Alex is secretly a federal agent using the marriage to probe her family's laundering network. Two liars fall in love as they turn the contract into a weapon against the real enemy.

title: THE BIG FREEZE
description: Climate scientist Jace Hardwell is murdered by his fiancée and wakes up thirty-seven days before a superfreeze will destroy the Northern Hemisphere. He builds a private bunker, exposes government lies, punishes his betrayers, and leads survivors toward a new civilization.

title: MY BILLIONAIRE STEPBROTHER
description: To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. title: survive and expose
description: A disabled girl discovers her uncle is using her as a test subject for an illegal experiment. Her mother agrees. But the girl has been collecting evidence all along. One call changes everything. The uncle falls. The mother awakens. And the daughter welcomes a bright future.

title: The snow stopped for me
description: After a five year secret romance, a loyal assistant is betrayed when her boss promotes his returning ex. Heartbroken, she quits and moves away to start a new life. When a cruel attack puts her in danger, her former boss discovers the truth and is consumed by regret. He risks his life to save her, but is it too late to win back her frozen heart?

title: He Betrayed Me, I Married My Savior
description: Her world shatters when her man abandons her. Deaf and mute, she enters a new marriage with a doctor, only to find he’s the one who saved her from a fire years ago. Just as her ex realizes she was his secret benefactor and comes crawling back, she resolves to be her own light. But will the past let her go?

title: The Wrath of Snake Spirit
description: Ignoring warnings, a greedy mine manager hunts snakes for gold and triggers vengeful snake spirits. After deaths and explosions, he abandons workers and gets killed by a giant python. Only a few men escape through fire. Will hidden serpents strike again deep in sealed‑off mountains?

title: Crown of Silver wrath
description: She receives a recall order from her brother, the chairman of the werewolf council, and goes to his engagement banquet. But she is humiliated by two people there. At the critical moment, her brother arrives. The bullies have their wolf souls taken away. She lets go of her hatred and vows to become a fair and just leader of their kind.

title: Cracked Statue Becomes a God
description: A broken village god, forgotten and cracked, gets one last prayer from a dying believer, and awakens a system of faith and power. He defeats demons, gathers worshipers, and grows from a forgotten statue to a true divine protector. Sometimes gods aren't born. They're rebuilt.

title: Heart Beats On Ice
description: Freshman Avery becomes Laurent’s hockey manager for a full scholarship and lands in a chaotic, hormone-charged team. She clashes with moody Declan, gentle Finn, playful Wyatt and obsessive Brody. As three teammates ask her to Christmas dinner, who will she choose?

title: (Dubbed) My Gambler Husband Is A God
description: Hunted by enemies, a powerful immortal possesses a mortal gambler. Using awakened magic, he cures his mute wife, builds a massive fortune, and crushes the corrupt elites who bullied them. But just as they find happiness, an army of gods descends from the heavens to claim his life! Can he protect her?

title: (Dubbed) I Dumped My Obsessed Ex for a Mafia Lord
description: Tortured for five years by a man who only loved her adopted sister, the young lady is reborn. She cuts all ties with him and marries a ruthless mafia leader to fulfill her destined fate. Too late, her former lover awakens to his true feelings and drowns in remorse—can he ever redeem his irreversible mistakes?

title: They Buried Me, I Forged a Kingdom
description: After a humiliating broken engagement, he harnesses his secret: advanced industrial tech. He defies the monopolies that control the market, turning barren land into an industrial empire. He's crushing the old guard, but they won't go down without a fight. His revenge is just beginning.

title: A Millionaire's Revenge Tastes Like Grapes
description: A tech millionaire returns with a rare grape, only to be betrayed by his uncle and the villagers. He tears up the contract, pulls the equipment, and leaves their harvest to rot. He invests in a failing farm run by veterans and builds a billion-dollar empire. When he arrives at the city's top, can the villagers finally understand the price of greed?

title: Reborn, I Reject the Crown Prince!
description: In her past life, she loved the crown prince and died with regret. After rebirth, she gives up the position of crown princess and asks the queen to arrange her marriage to her childhood sweetheart. But there is a bigger secret behind it all. Then the crown prince tries to frame them. How will they handle it?

title: The Miner's Wife? She's the Big Boss!
description: I turned the canteen into a goldmine with hundreds of miners fresh from the pit. The boss got rich, then called us coal rats and scraped the meat from our bowls. He had no idea the spotless new mine across the yard was run by my wife. When the man who starved you answers to the woman you married, who really owns the dirt beneath his feet?

title: The Golden Crop He Left To Rot
description: He brought a way for the village to earn real money, but they called his kindness greed. So he stepped back. He told them to sell the golden crop themselves and watched as the truckload of fortune began to rot. When the harvest turns to waste and the promises turn to dust, whose name will they beg for when ruin finally knocks on their door?

title: (Dubbed) Sweet Trap of the Ghost King
description: In the tenth year of supernatural revival, a global ghost marriage system is activated. A soft school beauty picks the most inconspicuous evil spirit out of kindness. Little does she know, this weak-looking partner is the supreme ghost emperor who has guarded her across countless lifetimes.

title: (Dubbed) Fatal Flattery Backfires
description: The sole heiress of a top pharmaceutical tycoon returns home. Her father’s secretary-lover brings priceless medical reagents to curry favor and win the family’s approval. A sudden car stop shatters the gift. Furious and unaware of the girl’s identity, she commits an unforgivable act—can she ever erase this fatal mistake?

title: What? My Daughter’s Lover Insulted Me?
description: After years abroad, a wealthy man meets his daughter’s secret lover at an auto shop. He learns the man tricks his naive daughter into misappropriating project money. At his welcome‑home party, the young man insults him. Will his daughter finally see through this selfish man?

title: American Sniper: The Kid of Guns
description: After Carl Oliver, The American Sniper and King of Guns, heroically dies saving a little boy named Spencer from a car explosion, his spirit is magically transferred into Spencer's 9 year old body. Now Carl, while inside the body of a 9 year old boy, must save his new family's gun range from unscrupulous relatives, evil rivals, and even deranged killers.

title: Sacrifice Only Brought Doubt
description: Against her father’s objection, a woman wed and nearly died in childbirth, then was forced apart from her husband. After her father passed, their daughter nursed her half-brother and planned to donate her heart to save him, yet the clan elder distrusted her and issued harsh threats.

title: What? My Daughter’s School Disappeared?
description: A single mother devotes sixteen years to raising her kid. Right after enrollment, the branch school along with her child vanishes. Everyone denies the school’s existence and locks her up as mentally ill. Having died accidentally, she gets reborn, determined to uncover what really happened.

title: Died Broke, Woke Up A Healing God!
description: Dying of cancer, a college student stumbles into a foot spa and finds his cousin's wife being sold. Beaten to death trying to save her, he awakens the Divine Farmer's Codex. He heals himself overnight and pulls a tycoon from the grave. But when a dying man becomes a god, can he ever mend his own broken past?

title: Son, You Saved the Wrong Father!
description: A doctor saves his father-in-law from a crash, letting his own father die. He misses the funeral to celebrate the man who caused it. At the grave, his mother reveals the truth: the father-in-law was drunk driving, and his wife covered it up. He divorces, quits his job, and returns home. Can a lifetime of devotion undo a single fatal choice?

title: The Abused Mafia Heiress
description: Desperate for love, she gave her entire fortune to her husband. But because she seems like a poor orphan, her toxic mother-in-law mercilessly abuses the pregnant wife! Little do they know, she is actually the lost heiress of a ruthless mafia billionaire! What happens when her real family finally finds her via a jade pendant?

description: Her world shatters when her man abandons her. Deaf and mute, she enters a new marriage with a doctor, only to find he’s the one who saved her from a fire years ago. Just as her ex realizes she was his secret benefactor and comes crawling back, she resolves to be her own light. But will the past let her go?

title: Crown of Silver wrath
description: She receives a recall order from her brother, the chairman of the werewolf council, and goes to his engagement banquet. But she is humiliated by two people there. At the critical moment, her brother arrives. The bullies have their wolf souls taken away. She lets go of her hatred and vows to become a fair and just leader of their kind.

title: Cracked Statue Becomes a God
description: A broken village god, forgotten and cracked, gets one last prayer from a dying believer, and awakens a system of faith and power. He defeats demons, gathers worshipers, and grows from a forgotten statue to a true divine protector. Sometimes gods aren't born. They're rebuilt.

title: Heart Beats On Ice
description: Freshman Avery becomes Laurent’s hockey manager for a full scholarship and lands in a chaotic, hormone-charged team. She clashes with moody Declan, gentle Finn, playful Wyatt and obsessive Brody. As three teammates ask her to Christmas dinner, who will she choose?

title: (Dubbed) My Gambler Husband Is A God
description: Hunted by enemies, a powerful immortal possesses a mortal gambler. Using awakened magic, he cures his mute wife, builds a massive fortune, and crushes the corrupt elites who bullied them. But just as they find happiness, an army of gods descends from the heavens to claim his life! Can he protect her?

title: (Dubbed) I Dumped My Obsessed Ex for a Mafia Lord
description: Tortured for five years by a man who only loved her adopted sister, the young lady is reborn. She cuts all ties with him and marries a ruthless mafia leader to fulfill her destined fate. Too late, her former lover awakens to his true feelings and drowns in remorse—can he ever redeem his irreversible mistakes?

title: They Buried Me, I Forged a Kingdom
description: After a humiliating broken engagement, he harnesses his secret: advanced industrial tech. He defies the monopolies that control the market, turning barren land into an industrial empire. He's crushing the old guard, but they won't go down without a fight. His revenge is just beginning.

title: A Millionaire's Revenge Tastes Like Grapes
description: A tech millionaire returns with a rare grape, only to be betrayed by his uncle and the villagers. He tears up the contract, pulls the equipment, and leaves their harvest to rot. He invests in a failing farm run by veterans and builds a billion-dollar empire. When he arrives at the city's top, can the villagers finally understand the price of greed?

title: Reborn, I Reject the Crown Prince!
description: In her past life, she loved the crown prince and died with regret. After rebirth, she gives up the position of crown princess and asks the queen to arrange her marriage to her childhood sweetheart. But there is a bigger secret behind it all. Then the crown prince tries to frame them. How will they handle it?

title: The Miner's Wife? She's the Big Boss!
description: I turned the canteen into a goldmine with hundreds of miners fresh from the pit. The boss got rich, then called us coal rats and scraped the meat from our bowls. He had no idea the spotless new mine across the yard was run by my wife. When the man who starved you answers to the woman you married, who really owns the dirt beneath his feet?

title: The Golden Crop He Left To Rot
description: He brought a way for the village to earn real money, but they called his kindness greed. So he stepped back. He told them to sell the golden crop themselves and watched as the truckload of fortune began to rot. When the harvest turns to waste and the promises turn to dust, whose name will they beg for when ruin finally knocks on their door?

title: (Dubbed) Sweet Trap of the Ghost King
description: In the tenth year of supernatural revival, a global ghost marriage system is activated. A soft school beauty picks the most inconspicuous evil spirit out of kindness. Little does she know, this weak-looking partner is the supreme ghost emperor who has guarded her across countless lifetimes.

title: (Dubbed) Fatal Flattery Backfires
description: The sole heiress of a top pharmaceutical tycoon returns home. Her father’s secretary-lover brings priceless medical reagents to curry favor and win the family’s approval. A sudden car stop shatters the gift. Furious and unaware of the girl’s identity, she commits an unforgivable act—can she ever erase this fatal mistake?

title: What? My Daughter’s Lover Insulted Me?
American Sniper: The Kid of Guns
description: After Carl Oliver, The American Sniper and King of Guns, heroically dies saving a little boy named Spencer from a car explosion, his spirit is magically transferred into Spencer's 9 year old body. Now Carl, while inside the body of a 9 year old boy, must save his new family's gun range from unscrupulous relatives, evil rivals, and even deranged killers.

title: Sacrifice Only Brought Doubt
description: Against her father’s objection, a woman wed and nearly died in childbirth, then was forced apart from her husband. After her father passed, their daughter nursed her half-brother and planned to donate her heart to save him, yet the clan elder distrusted her and issued harsh threats.

title: What? My Daughter’s School Disappeared?
description: A single mother devotes sixteen years to raising her kid. Right after enrollment, the branch school along with her child vanishes. Everyone denies the school’s existence and locks her up as mentally ill. Having died accidentally, she gets reborn, determined to uncover what really happened.

title: Died Broke, Woke Up A Healing God!
description: Dying of cancer, a college student stumbles into a foot spa and finds his cousin's wife being sold. Beaten to death trying to save her, he awakens the Divine Farmer's Codex. He heals himself overnight and pulls a tycoon from the grave. But when a dying man becomes a god, can he ever mend his own broken past?

title: Son, You Saved the Wrong Father!
description: A doctor saves his father-in-law from a crash, letting his own father die. He misses the funeral to celebrate the man who caused it. At the grave, his mother reveals the truth: the father-in-law was drunk driving, and his wife covered it up. He divorces, quits his job, and returns home. Can a lifetime of devotion undo a single fatal choice?

title: The Abused Mafia Heiress
description: Desperate for love, she gave her entire fortune to her husband. But because she seems like a poor orphan, her toxic mother-in-law mercilessly abuses the pregnant wife! Little do they know, she is actually the lost heiress of a ruthless mafia billionaire! What happens when her real family finally finds her via a jade pendant?

title: The Sterling Contract
description: Photographer Bianca Whitmore is forced into a one-year contract marriage with Alexander Sterling while investigating her mother's suspicious death. Alex is secretly a federal agent using the marriage to probe her family's laundering network. Two liars fall in love as they turn the contract into a weapon against the real enemy.

title: THE BIG FREEZE
description: Climate scientist Jace Hardwell is murdered by his fiancée and wakes up thirty-seven days before a superfreeze will destroy the Northern Hemisphere. He builds a private bunker, exposes government lies, punishes his betrayers, and leads survivors toward a new civilization.

title: MY BILLIONAIRE STEPBROTHER
description: To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. Amid family plots and deadly threats, the possessive man shields him. Gradually the straight‑laced youth gives in. Can their contractual bond grow into sincere lifelong love?

title: survive and expose
description: A disabled girl discovers her uncle is using her as a test subject for an illegal experiment. Her mother agrees. But the girl has been collecting evidence all along. One call changes everything. The uncle falls. The mother awakens. And the daughter welcomes a bright future.

title: The snow stopped for me
description: After a five year secret romance, a loyal assistant is betrayed when her boss promotes his returning ex. Heartbroken, she quits and moves away to start a new life. When a cruel attack puts her in danger, her former boss discovers the truth and is consumed by regret. He risks his life to save her, but is it too late to win back her frozen heart?

title: Barren Land Makes Her Rich Queen
description: A young woman farms corn on shared land with her fiancé's family. But she gets betrayed and kicked out. Left with only barren wasteland, she gains mysterious guidance from a land spirit. With its help she grows premium sweet corn and builds a thriving business, while her ex's family ruins their farm by trusting false advice and reaps bitter karma.

title: A Weak Girl Saved the Martial Hall?
description: During an accident, a martial arts master saves a young girl and has his soul transferred into her body. Facing greedy relatives who want to take over her family's martial arts school, she uses her top-level skills to shock everyone. To protect her family's legacy, what other challenges are waiting for her?

title: Steal My Beast? I'll Crush You All!
description: The ungrateful sect leader encourages a disciple in training to steal the ancient divine beast. Will the Grand Elder find out? And how will she deal with the sect and punish those responsible?

title: My Son Got Bullied? Now Mom Fights!
description: She is a CEO, but she hides her identity and sends her son to her own kindergarten. To her shock, her son has been bullied for a long time. She fiercely protects her son and investigates in secret. Then she discovers a bigger hidden secret. Can she clean everything up and fix the kindergarten?

title: Killed by My Family, Reborn to Rule
description: Betrayed by his own family and framed for his father's murder, he dies consumed by hatred. But fate gives him a second chance. Reborn before the tragedy unfolds, he returns as the only person who knows every lie, every betrayal, and every deadly scheme. This time, he won't just clear his name. He’ll make them pay.

title: Wicked Deeds Fall To Bring Justice
description: A man's father was killed by local gangsters in a flood, the murder disguised as an accident. For a decade, he gathers secret proof while doing charity. Villagers steal his toxic mushroom samples, get poisoned and frame him for extortion. Will he suffer the same fate as his father?

title: Framed Into Prison. Came Out a Real Chef!
description: A ten-time cooking champion, framed by his own partners and thrown in prison. Behind bars, a legendary old chef teaches him what real cooking actually means. Four years of grinding. Now he's out... Can one honest bowl of noodles take down an entire corrupt empire?

title: She Erased Their Love to Avenge Her Family!
description:
Her entire family was massacred in a royal power struggle. To infiltrate the court and uncover the truth, she sacrificed her own memories of the prince she loved — and disguised herself as his student. Now feelings are growing again... and her cover is slipping.
Can she expose the conspiracy before it's too late?

title: Fake Poor Girl? Actually a Billionaire!
description: A billionaire heiress hid her identity for four years, working a regular job and secretly building a billion-dollar company — all as a gift for the man she loved. He came back and got engaged to someone else. At her own welcome party, he humiliated her in front of everyone. Wrong move. What happens when the mask finally comes off?

title: From Fired to Champion Coach!
description: Once the world's best basketball player, he threw it all away with one mistake — and his mentor died because of it. Ten years later, he's a laughingstock assistant coach who just got fired. Now he's been handed a nobody team and one last shot... Can a broken legend actually bring them all the way to the top?

title: Undercover in the Palace and Now She's Pregnant?
description: To save her wrongly imprisoned father, a nobleman's daughter sneaks into the palace disguised as a maid. The Emperor hasn't touched a woman in ten years — but the first one to carry his heir becomes Empress. Six months later, she's pregnant... And someone at court just found out. Can she survive what comes next?

title: Arrow Through the Clouds
description: After his arrogance costs his best friend's life, legendary archer Harvey swears off killing and hides as a laborer in his fallen comrade's archery range. But when his friend's family is threatened, one arrow changes everything... and the Eagle Eye returns.

title: My Mother-in-Law's Got My Back
description: A young woman farms corn on shared land with her fiancé's family. But she gets betrayed and kicked out. Left with only barren wasteland, she gains mysterious guidance from a land spirit. With its help she grows premium sweet corn and builds a thriving business, while her ex's family ruins their farm by trusting false advice and reaps bitter karma.

title: Scrap-Heap Mech King
description: Naturals and modifieds live worlds apart. Orion Solari, a natural deemed unable to pilot a mech, was abandoned by humanity, despised by modifieds, and shamed by his own blood. Yet when humanity faces extinction, the one the world cast aside rises in a mech, strikes down the Hive Mother, and becomes its only savior.

title: The Invincible Baby Slaughters All
description: Seven years after little Leon, heir of the Capet family, was lost, he returns as Hal—a prodigy child mage from the Holy Mountain. Bound by a pact that keeps him from revealing he is Genevieve’s son, Hal plays cute and helpless, searching for a chance to reunite with her, while secretly crushing every enemy threatening his family.

title: Wrong Man in One Life, the Godfather in the Next
description: Murdered and reborn, the Irish Mafia heiress shreds her past obsessions, leaving her toxic ex to her two-faced stepsister. She steps into New York as the sacrificial bride to marry the ruthless Godfather, Vincenzo. Bracing for a deadly deal with the devil, she instead awakens an absolute, all-consuming devotion.

title: Time-Travel to Love a "Foolish" Emperor!
description: This is the story of a modern woman who travels back in time and becomes an ancient empress dowager. She struggles to survive in the middle of court power games. After her time travel, she meets the current emperor. But she finds that this emperor is a bit unusual. What kind of story will unfold between her and the emperor?

title: My Online Crush Is My Stepbrother
description: Max’s perfect online boyfriend “Babe” is sweet, caring, and always understands her. What she doesn’t know is that he’s actually Damon, her annoying stepbrother she can’t stand. When Damon discovers her secret identity, he starts showering her with affection. As Max searches for the truth, their long-awaited meetup reveals a shocking surprise.

title: Velvet, Blood & Power
description: Twelve years ago, she watched her sister die with a gold hairpin through her throat. Now she sleeps beside the general who ordered it. She’s his favorite mistress, her beauty a blade waiting for the perfect kill. Trapped between revenge and a forbidden desire, she must decide: finish the kill or fall into the same love that destroyed her bloodline?

title: That Mechanic Is a Racing Legend!
description: The undefeated racing god loses his younger brother in a racing accident. He stays away from racing for five years and becomes a car mechanic. But some people want to take the local land and force the villagers to give up the mountain road. At the critical moment, will he still choose to hide his true strength?

title: Fake Well Spirit Hides Dark Crimes
description: Weird sounds and shadows haunt an old village well, and a medium demands cash offerings to calm the supposed well spirit. A returnee finds her relative trapped and drugged by tomb raiders staging supernatural frights. With police help, the criminal gang is taken down. No one sees the medium faked her death to brew a far more dangerous plot.

title: Princess Who Played Poor
description: A princess hides her identity to live as a common wife. Her husband passes the imperial exams and tries to divorce her for a richer woman. His mother and mistress bully her. Then the guards kneel. The crown appears. And the "servant" they mocked is about to remind them what happens when you cross the emperor's sister.

title: The Storm Knight
description: Storm Rider Leonor Storm, King of Knights, hid as a groom after his wife Icarus died at his coronation. Eighteen years later, his daughter Serene, a Knight Commander, was wounded by Julian. Breaking his seal, Leonor killed a tenth-rank arcane beast in one stroke, revealing his true identity to the daughter who despised him.

title: Legend of the Undead World
description: Victor, the hidden Warlord, comes to M-City, meeting his wife Daisy and daughter Lily after 18 years. Amid a zombie siege, he faces betrayal and Logan's army to defeat Odin. Exposing the lie, he reunites with his family, creates a cure, and builds an alliance, saving the world and finding happiness.

title: Daddy's Little Mermaid
description: The Mermaid's mysterious one-night stand is revealed to be the ruthless deep-sea tyrant, a powerful sea ruler shrouded in cold secrecy. To her utter horror, this intimidating man also happens to be her fiancé's father! She is dragged into a dangerous web of forbidden desire and absolute possession.

title: Above the Galaxy: The Wasteland Miner Is a War God
description: In a blood-obsessed galaxy, lowly miner Raine enters deadly Vanguard trials to save his mother. Deemed fodder, he crushes noble elites barehanded, awakens his War-God frame, and one-punches a warship! When the Church condemns his alien blood, Raine shatters their sacred laws, rising as the supreme commander who rewrites the rules!

title: The Billionaire Mafia's Hidden Son
description: Eight years ago, Celia saved Adrian, a mafia billionaire, and fell pregnant, only to be imprisoned and disfigured by the cruel Evelyn. Years later, Adrian finds a 7-year-old art prodigy, Julian, unaware he's his son. Through a web of switched DNA tests and a masked imposter, Adrian must uncover the truth to save his true love and son.

title: Star Prison
description: A waitress has a one-night affair with a rancher's son, is framed by her stepsister, and spends six years in prison raising his child. When a paternity test exposes the truth, the rancher burns down every lie and fights to bring his family together.

title: You Just Bullied the Richest Daughter in the World
description: Those toxic rich snobs thought it was fun to treat a poor waitress like a punching bag. Little did they know, the "ghetto rat" they just assaulted is the precious daughter of the world's wealthiest woman, and now, she's coming for them!

title: Grassroots Team, World Cup Glory!
description: A retired legend dies saving a life and wakes in 2025. He walks the land, gathering forgotten players into a grassroots army. With ancient tactics, he forges them into a brotherhood and leads their charge from local fields to the world stage. When thirteen nobodies carry a nation's dream, can the spirit of the game ever truly be defeated?

title: One Wire, One Deadly Mistake
description: A veteran electrician discovers that a neighbor cut the building’s safety ground wire for personal gain, putting everyone’s lives at risk. After her warnings are ignored and she is threatened, she stops helping and protects only her own home. When disaster strikes, those who mocked her must face the deadly consequences of their choices.

title: Broken Legs, Stolen Crown: A Ballerina's Revenge
description: A prodigy ballerina’s legs are shattered by her adopted sister and fiancé on the eve of her chance to become a principal dancer. Abandoned by her family, she finds a second chance with her billionaire adoptive mother. After a hard-fought recovery, she returns to the stage and delivers a stunning performance to reclaim everything they stole.

title: Blood And Herbs For A Dragon's Betrayal
description: She saved twin dragons with her own blood and every herb she owned. When the beast tide came, she lay dying beside the brother. She crawled through hell to claim the only fruit that could save him. He ripped it from her hands and ran to his sister. When the soul you bled dry watches you die for a scratch, can the fire of vengeance ever be quenched?

title: Too Late: The Gambling Ace
description: In order to prevent the family casino from being shut down, the good-for-nothing eldest son took the blame and went to jail for his younger brother. However, after his release from prison, he was brutally expelled by his father.

title: Charger War? She's the CEO!
description: A new CEO goes undercover in an ordinary neighborhood to investigate corruption — and ends up in a war with the neighbors over a parking charger. They bullied the wrong woman. She's been collecting evidence the whole time... Did they really just pick a fight with the person who controls their future?

title: They Kicked Me Out of My Own House
description: A woman buys a home and lets her family move in, sacrificing everything to support them. But after years of paying the bills, her brother claims the house as his and tries to throw her out. Betrayed by her own family, she makes one shocking move that turns his wedding day into a nightmare.

title: The Burned Chef's Sweet Revenge
description: Betrayed by the woman he gave everything to, he rebuilds his life one dish at a time. With his childhood friend’s help, he rises from a broken kitchen to the pinnacle of his craft. Now, the ones who mocked him beg at his door. When the man they buried comes back, can those who only loved his ruin taste the glory they threw away?

title: The Nail Queen Strikes Back
description: A talented nail artist quits her job and risks everything to help her best friend’s salon succeed, only to be betrayed and underpaid. She hides her true plans and builds her own luxury beauty empire. When her former partner tries to humiliate her, she returns as a powerful entrepreneur and turns the tables.

title: Fake Weakling, Apex Dragon Rider
description: Once the greatest Dragon Knight, half-blood Elion lost his mother to jealous noble scheming. Hiding as a humble cleaner to guard his sister Anna, he waits four long years. When nobles trap Anna’s squad in a deadly abyss ritual, Leon unlocks his dormant dragon power. He avenges his mother, defeats tyrant elites, and forges a fair new world.

title: Gods on Call
description: Asclepius, god of medicine, is hunted by Hades and cast into a dead gambler's body. He heals a broken mute wife, contacts his divine allies on Olympus through video calls, and channels their power to build wealth and influence in the mortal world. But as his legend grows, he uncovers a deadly conspiracy between Hades and the criminal underworld.

title: My Wasteland Husband Is The Supreme Commander
description: In a zombie wasteland, Colvin—the Federation's supreme commander hidden 20 years as a hunter—saves Chloe, Queen of Phoenix Valley, sparking a deadly power struggle. Pursued by the smitten queen, misunderstood by his son, and provoked by traitors, he unleashes his power to reclaim the Federation, crush his foes, and win his queen.

title: Lured by the Wolf: Bite Me Softly, My Queen
description: Near death, werewolf Raven is rescued by Princess Lilian and becomes her bodyguard. A forced marriage, court scheming, assassinations and vengeance bind them in tangled love till they give their hearts to each other. But then Raven’s long-lost sister Ira arrives as the Eternal Winter Queen, bent on stealing Raven back and sparking war…

title: The Mafia Queens Revenge
description: A powerful gang boss retires to care for her sick daughter, leaving her empire to her husband. But her cheating husband's secret illegitimate son triggers her daughter's fatal heart attack! Worse, they conspire to steal the only matching donor heart for the bastard son. Watch this furious mother crush the betrayers and reclaim her throne!

title: Now His Secret Is My Weapon
description: Housewife Sophia wakes up and finds that she has swapped bodies with her husband, Matthew. She goes to his workplace, fights off his work rival, and deals with his mistress. He stays home and puts up with her difficult mother-in-law. But the body swap is only the smallest problem. Can they ever switch back to their own bodies?

title: Manhood Back, but Aged Overnight!
description: Desperate to save her failing marriage, a woman turns to a mysterious remedy that promises to restore her husband’s lost virility. But after he gets what he wants, he betrays her, ages overnight, and leaves her trapped in a terrifying secret where the “miracle” she found may be a curse.

title: Reborn to Ruin Everyone Who Hurt Her!
description: In her past life, she submitted to the emperor to secure wealth and status for her husband's family, only to end up despised by the public and abandoned by her husband. Devastated, she dragged him down to die with her. Reborn on the fateful night she made her worst mistake, she swears ruthless revenge on all who betrayed her!

title: Vengeance of the REAL PRINCESS
description: She transmigrates as the abandoned legitimate daughter and fights her way home to protect her mother. She crushes a rival clan, exposes a treasonous prince, and refuses a president's reward. Her only ambition is to stand at the head of her family. When a woman trades a nation for a single home, can any cage ever hold her?

title: My Secret Child With The CEO
description: She stole her dead friend's identity to love him. When the billionaire CEO discovers the lie, he fiercely dumps her. Five years later, he returns as her biggest client, only to discover she has a secret son—his son! He forces his way into her home to claim the boy. Can they defeat their ruthless enemies and finally heal their broken past?

title: Grain of Eternity
description: A woman discovers her world is a comic where she's forced to die repeatedly. The fallen Creator God binds himself to her through shared pain. She absorbs the darkness, shatters the panels, and breaks into reality—seizing the pen to write her own ending. No more tragedy. No more gods. Just her.

title: Eco Tycoon's Revenge
description: A famous environmental leader returns to his hometown for rituals. Villagers accuse his local factory of severe pollution. He hides his identity to investigate and finds something's wrong. Partnered with an inspector, he sets a trap for the corrupt group. Can he clear the pollution and bring justice to the suffering town?

title: Love After We Strayed Apart
description: Two lovers once vowed to stay together despite huge status gaps and family opposition. Yet a sudden accident changed everything. The woman left, choosing to bear all misunderstandings alone. Five years pass. She leads a quiet life raising two kids and buries her old love deep inside. One day, the man she never forgot suddenly reappears...

title: The Sterling Contract
description: Photographer Bianca Whitmore is forced into a one-year contract marriage with Alexander Sterling while investigating her mother's suspicious death. Alex is secretly a federal agent using the marriage to probe her family's laundering network. Two liars fall in love as they turn the contract into a weapon against the real enemy.

title: THE BIG FREEZE
description: Climate scientist Jace Hardwell is murdered by his fiancée and wakes up thirty-seven days before a superfreeze will destroy the Northern Hemisphere. He builds a private bunker, exposes government lies, punishes his betrayers, and leads survivors toward a new civilization.

title: MY BILLIONAIRE STEPBROTHER
description: To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. Amid family plots and deadly threats, the possessive man shields him. Gradually the straight‑laced youth gives in. Can their contractual bond grow into sincere lifelong love?

title: survive and expose
description: A disabled girl discovers her uncle is using her as a test subject for an illegal experiment. Her mother agrees. But the girl has been collecting evidence all along. One call changes everything. The uncle falls. The mother awakens. And the daughter welcomes a bright future.

title: The snow stopped for me
description: After a five year secret romance, a loyal assistant is betrayed when her boss promotes his returning ex. Heartbroken, she quits and moves away to start a new life. When a cruel attack puts her in danger, her former boss discovers the truth and is consumed by regret. He risks his life to save her, but is it too late to win back her frozen heart?

title: He Betrayed Me, I Married My Savior
description: Her world shatters when her man abandons her. Deaf and mute, she enters a new marriage with a doctor, only to find he’s the one who saved her from a fire years ago. Just as her ex realizes she was his secret benefactor and comes crawling back, she resolves to be her own light. But will the past let her go?

title: The Wrath of Snake Spirit
description: Ignoring warnings, a greedy mine manager hunts snakes for gold and triggers vengeful snake spirits. After deaths and explosions, he abandons workers and gets killed by a giant python. Only a few men escape through fire. Will hidden serpents strike again deep in sealed‑off mountains?

title: Crown of Silver wrath
description: She receives a recall order from her brother, the chairman of the werewolf council, and goes to his engagement banquet. But she is humiliated by two people there. At the critical moment, her brother arrives. The bullies have their wolf souls taken away. She lets go of her hatred and vows to become a fair and just leader of their kind.

title: Cracked Statue Becomes a God
description: A broken village god, forgotten and cracked, gets one last prayer from a dying believer, and awakens a system of faith and power. He defeats demons, gathers worshipers, and grows from a forgotten statue to a true divine protector. Sometimes gods aren't born. They're rebuilt.

title: Heart Beats On Ice
description: Freshman Avery becomes Laurent’s hockey manager for a full scholarship and lands in a chaotic, hormone-charged team. She clashes with moody Declan, gentle Finn, playful Wyatt and obsessive Brody. As three teammates ask her to Christmas dinner, who will she choose?

title: (Dubbed) My Gambler Husband Is A God
description: Hunted by enemies, a powerful immortal possesses a mortal gambler. Using awakened magic, he cures his mute wife, builds a massive fortune, and crushes the corrupt elites who bullied them. But just as they find happiness, an army of gods descends from the heavens to claim his life! Can he protect her?

title: (Dubbed) I Dumped My Obsessed Ex for a Mafia Lord
description: Tortured for five years by a man who only loved her adopted sister, the young lady is reborn. She cuts all ties with him and marries a ruthless mafia leader to fulfill her destined fate. Too late, her former lover awakens to his true feelings and drowns in remorse—can he ever redeem his irreversible mistakes?

title: They Buried Me, I Forged a Kingdom
description: After a humiliating broken engagement, he harnesses his secret: advanced industrial tech. He defies the monopolies that control the market, turning barren land into an industrial empire. He's crushing the old guard, but they won't go down without a fight. His revenge is just beginning.

title: A Millionaire's Revenge Tastes Like Grapes
description: A tech millionaire returns with a rare grape, only to be betrayed by his uncle and the villagers. He tears up the contract, pulls the equipment, and leaves their harvest to rot. He invests in a failing farm run by veterans and builds a billion-dollar empire. When he arrives at the city's top, can the villagers finally understand the price of greed?

title: Reborn, I Reject the Crown Prince!
description: In her past life, she loved the crown prince and died with regret. After rebirth, she gives up the position of crown princess and asks the queen to arrange her marriage to her childhood sweetheart. But there is a bigger secret behind it all. Then the crown prince tries to frame them. How will they handle it?

title: The Miner's Wife? She's the Big Boss!
description: I turned the canteen into a goldmine with hundreds of miners fresh from the pit. The boss got rich, then called us coal rats and scraped the meat from our bowls. He had no idea the spotless new mine across the yard was run by my wife. When the man who starved you answers to the woman you married, who really owns the dirt beneath his feet?

title: The Golden Crop He Left To Rot
description: He brought a way for the village to earn real money, but they called his kindness greed. So he stepped back. He told them to sell the golden crop themselves and watched as the truckload of fortune began to rot. When the harvest turns to waste and the promises turn to dust, whose name will they beg for when ruin finally knocks on their door?

title: (Dubbed) Sweet Trap of the Ghost King
description: In the tenth year of supernatural revival, a global ghost marriage system is activated. A soft school beauty picks the most inconspicuous evil spirit out of kindness. Little does she know, this weak-looking partner is the supreme ghost emperor who has guarded her across countless lifetimes.

title: (Dubbed) Fatal Flattery Backfires
description: The sole heiress of a top pharmaceutical tycoon returns home. Her father’s secretary-lover brings priceless medical reagents to curry favor and win the family’s approval. A sudden car stop shatters the gift. Furious and unaware of the girl’s identity, she commits an unforgivable act—can she ever erase this fatal mistake?

title: What? My Daughter’s Lover Insulted Me?
description: After years abroad, a wealthy man meets his daughter’s secret lover at an auto shop. He learns the man tricks his naive daughter into misappropriating project money. At his welcome‑home party, the young man insults him. Will his daughter finally see through this selfish man?

title: American Sniper: The Kid of Guns
description: After Carl Oliver, The American Sniper and King of Guns, heroically dies saving a little boy named Spencer from a car explosion, his spirit is magically transferred into Spencer's 9 year old body. Now Carl, while inside the body of a 9 year old boy, must save his new family's gun range from unscrupulous relatives, evil rivals, and even deranged killers.

title: Sacrifice Only Brought Doubt
description: Against her father’s objection, a woman wed and nearly died in childbirth, then was forced apart from her husband. After her father passed, their daughter nursed her half-brother and planned to donate her heart to save him, yet the clan elder distrusted her and issued harsh threats.

title: What? My Daughter’s School Disappeared?
description: A single mother devotes sixteen years to raising her kid. Right after enrollment, the branch school along with her child vanishes. Everyone denies the school’s existence and locks her up as mentally ill. Having died accidentally, she gets reborn, determined to uncover what really happened.

title: Died Broke, Woke Up A Healing God!
description: Dying of cancer, a college student stumbles into a foot spa and finds his cousin's wife being sold. Beaten to death trying to save her, he awakens the Divine Farmer's Codex. He heals himself overnight and pulls a tycoon from the grave. But when a dying man becomes a god, can he ever mend his own broken past?

title: Son, You Saved the Wrong Father!
description: A doctor saves his father-in-law from a crash, letting his own father die. He misses the funeral to celebrate the man who caused it. At the grave, his mother reveals the truth: the father-in-law was drunk driving, and his wife covered it up. He divorces, quits his job, and returns home. Can a lifetime of devotion undo a single fatal choice?

title: Barren Land Makes Her Rich Queen
description: A young woman farms corn on shared land with her fiancé's family. But she gets betrayed and kicked out. Left with only barren wasteland, she gains mysterious guidance from a land spirit. With its help she grows premium sweet corn and builds a thriving business, while her ex's family ruins their farm by trusting false advice and reaps bitter karma.

title: A Weak Girl Saved the Martial Hall?
description: During an accident, a martial arts master saves a young girl and has his soul transferred into her body. Facing greedy relatives who want to take over her family's martial arts school, she uses her top-level skills to shock everyone. To protect her family's legacy, what other challenges are waiting for her?

title: Steal My Beast? I'll Crush You All!
description: The ungrateful sect leader encourages a disciple in training to steal the ancient divine beast. Will the Grand Elder find out? And how will she deal with the sect and punish those responsible?

title: My Son Got Bullied? Now Mom Fights!
description: She is a CEO, but she hides her identity and sends her son to her own kindergarten. To her shock, her son has been bullied for a long time. She fiercely protects her son and investigates in secret. Then she discovers a bigger hidden secret. Can she clean everything up and fix the kindergarten?

title: Killed by My Family, Reborn to Rule
description: Betrayed by his own family and framed for his father's murder, he dies consumed by hatred. But fate gives him a second chance. Reborn before the tragedy unfolds, he returns as the only person who knows every lie, every betrayal, and every deadly scheme. This time, he won't just clear his name. He’ll make them pay.

title: Wicked Deeds Fall To Bring Justice
description: A man's father was killed by local gangsters in a flood, the murder disguised as an accident. For a decade, he gathers secret proof while doing charity. Villagers steal his toxic mushroom samples, get poisoned and frame him for extortion. Will he suffer the same fate as his father?

title: Framed Into Prison. Came Out a Real Chef!
description: A ten-time cooking champion, framed by his own partners and thrown in prison. Behind bars, a legendary old chef teaches him what real cooking actually means. Four years of grinding. Now he's out... Can one honest bowl of noodles take down an entire corrupt empire?

title: She Erased Their Love to Avenge Her Family!
description:
Her entire family was massacred in a royal power struggle. To infiltrate the court and uncover the truth, she sacrificed her own memories of the prince she loved — and disguised herself as his student. Now feelings are growing again... and her cover is slipping.
Can she expose the conspiracy before it's too late?

title: Fake Poor Girl? Actually a Billionaire!
description: A billionaire heiress hid her identity for four years, working a regular job and secretly building a billion-dollar company — all as a gift for the man she loved. He came back and got engaged to someone else. At her own welcome party, he humiliated her in front of everyone. Wrong move. What happens when the mask finally comes off?

title: From Fired to Champion Coach!
description: Once the world's best basketball player, he threw it all away with one mistake — and his mentor died because of it. Ten years later, he's a laughingstock assistant coach who just got fired. Now he's been handed a nobody team and one last shot... Can a broken legend actually bring them all the way to the top?

title: Undercover in the Palace and Now She's Pregnant?
description: To save her wrongly imprisoned father, a nobleman's daughter sneaks into the palace disguised as a maid. The Emperor hasn't touched a woman in ten years — but the first one to carry his heir becomes Empress. Six months later, she's pregnant... And someone at court just found out. Can she survive what comes next?

title: Arrow Through the Clouds
description: After his arrogance costs his best friend's life, legendary archer Harvey swears off killing and hides as a laborer in his fallen comrade's archery range. But when his friend's family is threatened, one arrow changes everything... and the Eagle Eye returns.

title: My Mother-in-Law's Got My Back
description: A young woman farms corn on shared land with her fiancé's family. But she gets betrayed and kicked out. Left with only barren wasteland, she gains mysterious guidance from a land spirit. With its help she grows premium sweet corn and builds a thriving business, while her ex's family ruins their farm by trusting false advice and reaps bitter karma.

title: Scrap-Heap Mech King
description: Naturals and modifieds live worlds apart. Orion Solari, a natural deemed unable to pilot a mech, was abandoned by humanity, despised by modifieds, and shamed by his own blood. Yet when humanity faces extinction, the one the world cast aside rises in a mech, strikes down the Hive Mother, and becomes its only savior.

title: The Invincible Baby Slaughters All
description: Seven years after little Leon, heir of the Capet family, was lost, he returns as Hal—a prodigy child mage from the Holy Mountain. Bound by a pact that keeps him from revealing he is Genevieve’s son, Hal plays cute and helpless, searching for a chance to reunite with her, while secretly crushing every enemy threatening his family.

title: Wrong Man in One Life, the Godfather in the Next
description: Murdered and reborn, the Irish Mafia heiress shreds her past obsessions, leaving her toxic ex to her two-faced stepsister. She steps into New York as the sacrificial bride to marry the ruthless Godfather, Vincenzo. Bracing for a deadly deal with the devil, she instead awakens an absolute, all-consuming devotion.

title: Time-Travel to Love a "Foolish" Emperor!
description: This is the story of a modern woman who travels back in time and becomes an ancient empress dowager. She struggles to survive in the middle of court power games. After her time travel, she meets the current emperor. But she finds that this emperor is a bit unusual. What kind of story will unfold between her and the emperor?

title: My Online Crush Is My Stepbrother
description: Max’s perfect online boyfriend “Babe” is sweet, caring, and always understands her. What she doesn’t know is that he’s actually Damon, her annoying stepbrother she can’t stand. When Damon discovers her secret identity, he starts showering her with affection. As Max searches for the truth, their long-awaited meetup reveals a shocking surprise.

title: Velvet, Blood & Power
description: Twelve years ago, she watched her sister die with a gold hairpin through her throat. Now she sleeps beside the general who ordered it. She’s his favorite mistress, her beauty a blade waiting for the perfect kill. Trapped between revenge and a forbidden desire, she must decide: finish the kill or fall into the same love that destroyed her bloodline?

title: That Mechanic Is a Racing Legend!
description: The undefeated racing god loses his younger brother in a racing accident. He stays away from racing for five years and becomes a car mechanic. But some people want to take the local land and force the villagers to give up the mountain road. At the critical moment, will he still choose to hide his true strength?

title: Fake Well Spirit Hides Dark Crimes
description: Weird sounds and shadows haunt an old village well, and a medium demands cash offerings to calm the supposed well spirit. A returnee finds her relative trapped and drugged by tomb raiders staging supernatural frights. With police help, the criminal gang is taken down. No one sees the medium faked her death to brew a far more dangerous plot.

title: Princess Who Played Poor
description: A princess hides her identity to live as a common wife. Her husband passes the imperial exams and tries to divorce her for a richer woman. His mother and mistress bully her. Then the guards kneel. The crown appears. And the "servant" they mocked is about to remind them what happens when you cross the emperor's sister.

She hides her true plans and builds her own luxury beauty empire. When her former partner tries to humiliate her, she returns as a powerful entrepreneur and turns the tables.

title: THE BIG FREEZE
description: Climate scientist Jace Hardwell is murdered by his fiancée and wakes up thirty-seven days before a superfreeze will destroy the Northern Hemisphere. He builds a private bunker, exposes government lies, punishes his betrayers, and leads survivors toward a new civilization.

title: MY BILLIONAIRE STEPBROTHER
description: To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. Amid family plots and deadly threats, the possessive man shields him. Gradually the straight‑laced youth gives in. Can their contractual bond grow into sincere lifelong love?
